_comment: Smoke-test listing fixture for render_pdfs.py. Uses picsum placeholder images so the test runs offline without depending on Zillow CDN. Real pipeline will pass actual Zillow photo URLs and Claude-generated narrative blocks.
lede_headline: A quiet street, a brick exterior, and rooms that hold light all day.
lede_paragraph: 148 Pheasant Run sits at the calm end of a Paducah cul-de-sac, the kind of address where the school bus still stops at the corner. Inside, the house unfolds in a sequence of generous public rooms — a vaulted living room with a brick fireplace, a kitchen wrapped in maple cabinetry, a dining room that catches the south light. Four bedrooms upstairs. Two-car garage. A back deck that looks across half an acre of hardwoods.
public_paragraph: The first floor opens into a living room with vaulted ceilings and a brick fireplace as the focal point. The kitchen flows directly off the living room — maple cabinets, granite counters, a peninsula that fits four stools. A formal dining room anchors the south side of the house and stays bright from morning through late afternoon.
public_pt_2: Granite counters · maple cabinets · peninsula seating
public_pt_4: Hardwood floors throughout the public rooms
signature_paragraph: Floor-to-ceiling brick, a raised hearth, a mantel wide enough for stockings or a row of framed photos. It is the room's center of gravity in winter and a quiet sculpture in summer. Two-story flue, original to the build.
private_headline: A primary suite at the top of the stairs.
private_paragraph: The primary bedroom sits at the back of the house, away from the street. A walk-in closet and a private bath with a soaking tub and separate shower. Three additional bedrooms share the upstairs hallway — flexible for kids, guests, or a home office.
private_pt_1: Walk-in closet · soaking tub · separate shower
pullquote_text: A house that earns the word 'home' the way only a quiet street and good light can earn it.
description_short: Sited at the calm end of a Paducah cul-de-sac, 148 Pheasant Run pairs a vaulted-ceiling great room with a generous kitchen, a private primary suite, and a back deck overlooking nearly half an acre of hardwoods. Four bedrooms, three full baths, a two-car garage, and finishes that have been carefully maintained since the home was built.
